title: CLI, Configuration, Packaging, Scheduling, Overlap, Logs, and Recovery · Behavior Case: Cli Configuration
summary: The script embeds targets and secrets, has ambiguous exit status, runs overlapping cron jobs, writes partial reports, logs content forever, and cannot restore a prior release. Predict authorization, identity, scope, parsing, extraction, crawl state, resource use, privacy, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cli configuration increment in installable and operable crawler release candidate. Learners progress through predic…
objectives: Design typed CLI and configuration precedence for targets, policy, budgets, output, dry-run, checkpoint, resume, revision, and secret references.
Correlate crawl, request, response, page, extraction, queue, retry, block, privacy, output, and recovery events with bounded labels and redaction.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: scraper-cli-configuration — Design typed CLI and configuration precedence for targets, policy, budgets, output, dry-run, checkpoint, resume, revision, and secret references.
# Evidence: scraper-worked-scraper-packaging-scheduling-operations-5
# Competency: scraper-worked-scraper-packaging-scheduling-operations-5.
# Case 9036: a multilingual public-service site review.
# Operating constraint: the prior valid checkpoint and report must survive failure.
# Changed case: introduce a block, private field, dangerous destination, or spreadsheet formula and stop or reject it.
def worked_scraper_packaging_scheduling_operations_5(target_platforms: int = 3, clean_installs: int = 3, scheduled_runs: int = 12, overlap_incidents: int = 0, restore_minutes: int = 6) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "authorizationworked5",
        "url9036",
        "response5dekrow",
        "treeworked59036",
        "frontier9036worked5",
        "report5dekrow9036",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if target_platforms < 1 or clean_installs < 0:
        return False, clean_installs, "package-matrix"
    if clean_installs != target_platforms:
        return False, clean_installs, "clean-install-gap"
    if scheduled_runs < 1 or overlap_incidents > 0:
        return False, overlap_incidents, "schedule-overlap"
    if restore_minutes < 0 or restore_minutes > 20:
        return False, restore_minutes, "restore-budget"
    assert clean_installs == target_platforms and overlap_incidents == 0
    return True, clean_installs, "operable-crawler-release"

content.code:
# Evidence: scraper-cli-configuration-or7q6w
# Competency: scraper-cli-configuration.
# Case 9519: a clean package and recovery drill.
# Operating constraint: the prior valid checkpoint and report must survive failure.
# Changed case: change malformed markup or parser choice and preserve extraction provenance.
def evidence_scraper_cli_configuration_or7q6w(target_platforms: int = 3, clean_installs: int = 3, scheduled_runs: int = 12, overlap_incidents: int = 0, restore_minutes: int = 6) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_or7q6w = "or7q6w-w6q7ro-9519"
    assert evidence_variant_or7q6w
    evidence_axes_or7q6w = (
        "authorizationor7q6w",
        "url9519",
        "responsew6q7ro",
        "treeor7q6w9519",
        "frontier9519or7q6w",
        "reportw6q7ro9519",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_or7q6w)) == 6
    if target_platforms < 1 or clean_installs < 0:
        return False, clean_installs, "package-matrix"
    if clean_installs != target_platforms:
        return False, clean_installs, "clean-install-gap"
    if scheduled_runs < 1 or overlap_incidents > 0:
        return False, overlap_incidents, "schedule-overlap"
    if restore_minutes < 0 or restore_minutes > 20:
        return False, restore_minutes, "restore-budget"
    assert clean_installs == target_platforms and overlap_incidents == 0
    return True, clean_installs, "operable-crawler-release"

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Cli Configuration structural check is only one gate. installable and operable crawler release candidate must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.

hints: For Authorized crawling and Python Build Cli Configuration evidence · Theory Cli Configuration, name the owner, authorization, stakeholder, revision, runtime, dependency, seed, URL, origin, robots, response, parser, selector, record, frontier, privacy, report, stop, recovery, and transfer boundary, Cli Configuration precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Authorized crawling and Python Build Cli Configuration evidence · Theory Cli Configuration, trace this concrete input and predict authorization, URL admission, robots, fetch, redirect, decode, parse, extract, provenance, schedule, report, rejection, stop, rollback, recovery, and native evidence before reviewing it: A theory site-quality team handles case 2525 during a local-server failure rehearsal. Build deterministic Python evidence to validate CLI and package contracts, clean installs, scheduler overlap control, retention, restore, and operational ownership; the prior valid checkpoint and report must survive failure; then change one base URL, fragment, query, Unicode host, or redirect and reapply scope. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, TLS, HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright, browsers, files, credentials, target sites, accessibility evaluation, privacy or legal review, load, schedulers, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Design typed CLI and configuration precedence for targets, policy, budgets, output, dry-run, checkpoint, resume, revision, and secret references.

For Authorized crawling and Python Build Cli Configuration evidence · Theory Cli Configuration, challenge the documented misconception with changed-authorization, URL, robots rule, response, encoding, markup, selector, frontier, timing, session, browser, privacy, security, export, failure, recovery, and controlled owner transfer evidence: Environment variables alone form a clear validated crawler interface.

steps.title: Authorized crawling and Python Defend the Cli Configuration model · Theory Cli Configuration
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Cli Configuration: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory site-quality team handles case 9906 during a multilingual public-service site review. Build deterministic Python evidence to validate CLI and package contracts, clean installs, scheduler overlap control, retention, restore, and operational ownership; the prior valid checkpoint and report must survive failure; then change malformed markup or parser choice and preserve extraction provenance. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, TLS, HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright, browsers, files, credentials, target sites, accessibility evaluation, privacy or legal review, load, schedulers, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Design typed CLI and configuration precedence for targets, policy, budgets, output, dry-run, checkpoint, resume, revision, and secret references.

Evidence target: Authorized crawling and Python Defend the Cli Configuration model · Theory Cli Configuration.
steps.why: Retrieving Cli Configuration through the concrete installable and operable crawler release candidate case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Authorized crawling and Python Defend the Cli Configuration model · Theory Cli Configuration, keep Cli Configuration connected to executable Python authorization, URL, response, parse, provenance, frontier, report, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Design typed CLI and configuration precedence for targets, policy, budgets, output, dry-run, checkpoint, resume, revision, and secret references.

checks.description: The cumulative python portfolio contains this competency’s named evidence increment.
checks.failureMessage: Add the exact evidence marker # Evidence: scraper-cli-configuration-or7q6w.

checks.pattern: # Evidence: scraper-cli-configuration-or7q6w(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?def\s+evidence_scraper_cli_configuration_or7q6w\s*\((?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?\)\s*(?:->[^:]+)?\s*:(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?target_platforms < 1 or clean_installs < 0)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?clean_installs != target_platforms)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?scheduled_runs < 1 or overlap_incidents > 0)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?restore_minutes < 0 or restore_minutes > 20)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?assert)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
